name: App Store Intelligence API
description: Real-time app rankings, details, reviews, and search from Apple App Store + Google Play Store via mobile carrier IPs. Four query types: rankings, app details, search, trending.
longDescription: Scrapes real-time app intelligence from both Apple App Store and Google Play Store through real 4G/5G mobile carrier IPs. Enterprise tools (Sensor Tower, data.ai) charge $30K-$100K+/year — this brings it to $0.01-0.015/request. Four endpoints: rankings (top apps by category and country), app (full metadata + reviews), search (keyword lookup), trending (new/hot apps). Apple data via iTunes RSS + Lookup + Reviews APIs for structured JSON. Google Play via HTML scraping with mobile proxy for geo-accurate results. Covers all 6 countries (US, DE, FR, ES, GB, PL) with carrier-specific geo-targeting.

pricing.comparison: Sensor Tower: $30K+/year. data.ai (App Annie): $50K+/year. 42matters: $500/month. SimilarWeb: $10K+/year. No pay-per-request alternative exists — this opens mobile app intelligence to smaller players and AI agents at $0.01/query.

whyMobileProxy: Both app stores geo-fence their content based on IP location and carrier. Apple App Store shows different featured apps, rankings, and carrier-exclusive promotions based on the user's mobile carrier (T-Mobile US sees different featured apps than Vodafone DE). Google Play Store aggressively blocks datacenter IPs — automated scraping from datacenter IPs hits rate limits at 500-1,000 apps/day. Mobile carrier IPs are treated as legitimate app store users, bypassing anti-bot detection and returning authentic, carrier-specific results.

rankings.appId: string — Apple numeric ID or Google package name

limitations: Apple rankings limited to top 50 per category via RSS feed
Google Play HTML parsing may miss some metadata when page structure changes
Apple reviews limited to 10 most recent per app
Google Play review extraction depends on page rendering (may return fewer in some countries)
Rate limited to 20 requests/minute per client IP
